violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Many wet cloths found throughout coffee, cook line. Sanitizer bucket found but not accessible to utilizing.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Dishwasher found at 0ppm CL. Bucket found empty.
Handwashing lavatories. — --- Gravy bucket placed in handwash sink at time of inspection.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. - Items in prep cooler stored higher or in second container not allowing for the prep cooler to maintain items at 41F or below. All items moved and properly stored.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
